metadata.description: Official plugin marketplace for the Harmonius game engine.

plugins.description: Markdown linting and formatting via rumdl: LSP server, PostToolUse fmt hook, and the markdown coding-standard skill.
plugins.name: rumdl

plugins.description: Generic workflow orchestration plugin. Two primitives — workflow and artifact — with a uniform artifact-provider contract. Ships the `default` orchestrator + tutor, `author`/`review`/`update` meta-workflows, and generic providers (execution, file-local, conversation, preferences, notifications). Designed for extension: workflow-github, workflow-documents, and workflow-sdlc ride on top.
plugins.name: workflow

plugins.description: GitHub artifact providers for the workflow plugin: gh-pr, gh-issue, gh-release, gh-milestone, gh-tag, gh-branch, gh-gist. Required for teams using GitHub as the workflow backend.
plugins.name: workflow-github

plugins.description: Document artifact providers + templates for the workflow plugin. Includes `document` (local) and `confluence-page` providers and a library of eight markdown document templates (design, plan, review, release, test, requirement, user-story, triage).
plugins.name: workflow-documents

plugins.description: SDLC artifact templates and workflows for the workflow plugin. Composable cycles (write-review, plan-do, design-implement-review, sdlc, PM + project-mgmt cycles) and canned workflows (bug-fix, cut-release). Depends on workflow-github and workflow-documents.
plugins.name: workflow-sdlc

plugins.description: Cross-platform user-env-var onboarding helper. Detects the user's shell (zsh / bash / fish / sh / ksh / PowerShell) and persists environment variables to the right config — rc file, $PROFILE, or HKCU:\Environment registry on Windows PowerShell. Used as a dependency by other plugins that need to set env vars during onboarding.
plugins.name: env-setup
